prestazioni: Upgrade to a **GTA Performance GTA2260S** turbocharger (bolt-on for the **GAC 4B20J1** 2.0L turbocharged engine, supporting 350+ HP with stock internals) paired with a **PTP Turbo Blanket** to reduce heat soak and improve spool consistency.

Install a **Motec M150 ECU** with a **GAC 4B20J1-specific calibration** (developed by **V-Tech Motorsport**), optimizing ignition timing, fuel maps, and boost control for 98 RON fuel, targeting 22 PSI peak boost with a **TurboSmart Kompact 40mm wastegate** for precise overboost protection.

Replace the stock intercooler with a **GReddy Type-S front-mount intercooler** (custom piping by **3D Racing**) and integrate a **PWR Performance radiator** with dual **SPAL 16" fans** to maintain intake temps below 45°C under sustained 3rd-gear pulls.
estetica: Install a **Liberty Walk LB-WORKS widebody kit** (AION Y-specific, with carbon fiber fenders and extended rear quarters) paired with **Work Emotion CR Kiwami** 19x10.5 ET20 wheels (staggered setup, 245/35 front, 275/30 rear) and **BC Racing BR coilovers** for aggressive stance.

Apply a **3M Matte Graphite Vinyl Wrap** (full body, including roof) with **Rally Armor UR mud flaps** (custom AION Y cutouts) and **Vland LED taillights** (sequential turn signals, smoked housing) for a stealth JDM-inspired aesthetic.

Replace the front bumper with a **Seibon Carbon Fiber AION Y lip spoiler** (OEM+ fitment) and add a **Maxton Design rear diffuser** (carbon fiber, with integrated **Oracle Lighting RGB LED underglow**) for aggressive aerodynamics and nighttime presence.
